drug_name: Foster and Thrive Lubricating Tears Lubricant Eye Drops
active_ingredients: Active ingredients Polyethylene glycol 400 0.4% Propylene glycol 0.3%
indications_and_usage: Uses for temporary relief of burning and irritation due to dryness of the eye
dosage_and_administration: Directions instill 1 or 2 drops in the affected eye(s) as needed
